Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  csbeq1d Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem csbeq1d 3856
Description: Equality deduction for proper substitution into a class. (Contributed by NM, 3-Dec-2005.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
csbeq1d.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
Assertion
Ref Expression
csbeq1d ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐶 = ⦋𝐵 / 𝑥⦌𝐶)
Proof of Theorem csbeq1d
StepHypRef Expression
1 csbeq1d.1 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐵)
2 csbeq1 3855 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐶 = ⦋𝐵 / 𝑥⦌𝐶)
31, 2syl 17 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐶 = ⦋𝐵 / 𝑥⦌𝐶)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560  ⦋csb 3852
